verse_specific_anchors: svarga-para — heaven as the supreme goal (one bounded attainment treated as ultimate)
janma-karma-phala-pradām — yielding rebirth as karma-fruit (the saṃsāric loop)
kriyā-viśeṣa-bahulā — abounding in elaborate ritual specification (the demo-week machinery)
bhoga-aiśvarya-gati — trajectory toward enjoyment and lordship (real but bounded)
verdict_reason: The engineering analog is anchored in the specific 'predicative content of the puṣpitā-vāc' framing — what fruits the speech promises and what trajectory it produces. That is uniquely 2.43's contribution to the 2.42-44 unit. 2.42 names the speakers; 2.43 names the goal-trajectory; 2.44 names the consequence. The promo-cycle constitutive-shift framing requires precisely 2.43's bhoga-aiśvarya-gati + janma-karma-phala-pradām pair. PASS for both 7.6 and 3.5.
